column1: DC breakdown strength measurement,hasLocation,thermostatically controlled enclosure
description_of_melt_mixing,asString,The particles and polyethylene were melt mixed until the aggregate size was less than 100 nm as measured using scanning electron microscopy.
description_of_vacuum_drying,asString,The particles were vacuum dried for 24 h immediately prior to compounding.
description_of_hot_pressing,asString,All samples were created by hot pressing, and then allowed to cool slowly to room temperature, keeping the pressure constant.
description_of_post-curing,asString,The samples were post-cured under vacuum which is important since cross-linking byproducts may otherwise affect the electrical properties.
description_of_metallization,asString,The samples meant for electrical testing were metallized with ~150 A [˚ ] of sputtered gold.
EPR spectroscopy,hasEquipment,Walker Hall probe Tesla meter
description_of_EPR_spectroscopy,asString,All the powdered silica samples and composites (cryo-crushed) were measured using a Bruker ER 042 EPR spectrometer.
description_of_XPS_analysis,asString,XPS analysis was done on a Perkin Elmer (Model # 5500) using MgK a monochromatic radiation.
description_of_argon_cleaning,asString,after 3 min, 6 min and 9 min of argon cleaning
description_of_DC_breakdown_strength_measurement,asString,The DC breakdown strength was measured using recessed specimens with gold electrodes.

description_of_Long-term_voltage_endurance_tests,asString,Long-term voltage endurance tests were carried out using cylindrical blocks of polymer or polymer nanocomposites, embedded with a tungsten electrode of tip radius, r, of approximately 4 lm (for a highly divergent field) and 12 lm (for a less divergent field), with an inter-electrode distance, d, of ~2 mm.
Dielectric spectroscopic measurements,hasEquipment,Novocontrol Alpha Analyzer (type K)
Dielectric spectroscopic measurements,hasEquipment,Novocontrol active BDS-1200 sample cell

description_of_Dielectric_spectroscopic_measurements,asString,Dielectric spectroscopic measurements of the samples were completed at 25 C, 60 C, 70 C, and 80 C using a Novocontrol Alpha Analyzer (type K) in combination with a Novocontrol active BDS-1200 sample cell.
description_of_TSC_measurements,asString,TSC measurements were performed using laminar samples of thickness ~100 lm with sputtered deposited platinum electrodes on both sides.
Absorption current measurements,hasEquipment,Keithley 8009 Resistivity Test Fixture

description_of_Absorption_current_measurements,asString,Absorption current measurements were performed utilizing a Keithley 8009 Resistivity Test Fixture on laminar samples of thickness from 50 lm to 500 lm over a range of electric fields from 10 [5] V/m to 3 · 10 [7] V/m, and all measurements were performed at room temperature (298 ± 3 K).
